title: Introduction to Cloud Infrastructure: Describe cloud concepts
summary: Introductory learning path that is part of the Azure Infrastructure fundamentals content.

sections.title: Introduction to Cloud Infrastructure: Describe cloud concepts
sections.summary: Introductory learning path that is part of the Azure Infrastructure fundamentals content.

lessons.title: Describe cloud computing
lessons.content_md:
Introduction to concepts surrounding cloud computing. Mostly platform agnostic, focused instead on general concepts.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/describe-cloud-compute/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Describe the benefits of using cloud services
lessons.content_md:
Introduction to concepts surrounding cloud computing. Focused on benefits of using cloud services such as reliability and management.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/describe-benefits-use-cloud-services/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Describe the benefits of using cloud services

lessons.title: Describe cloud service types
lessons.content_md:
Introduction to cloud service types (Infrastructure, Platform, and Software as a Service models) and associated use cases for each.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/describe-cloud-service-types/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Introduction to Cloud Infrastructure: Describe cloud concepts
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Introduction to Cloud Infrastructure: Describe cloud concepts**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
